title: TECHNOVANZA 2026 - Annual Technical Symposium
description: The flagship annual technical symposium of PSR Engineering College's IT Department featuring coding competitions, hackathons, paper presentations, and tech talks by industry experts from TCS, Infosys, and Zoho.

title: Workshop on Cloud Computing & DevOps
description: A two-day hands-on workshop on AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines conducted by Zoho engineers at PSR campus.
venue: IT Seminar Hall, PSR Engineering College

title: Guest Lecture: Future of AI in Industry
description: An insightful guest lecture by a senior data scientist from TCS Digital on the applications of AI in modern industries and career pathways.
venue: IT Seminar Hall, PSR Engineering College

title: Hackathon 2025 - Code for Sivakasi
description: A 36-hour hackathon focused on building technology solutions for local community challenges in the Virudhunagar District.
venue: IT Block - All Labs, PSR Engineering College

title: Industry Visit to Zoho Corporation, Chennai
description: Third-year IT students visited Zoho Corporation in Chennai to understand industry practices, product development, and work culture.

title: International Conference on Emerging Technologies (ICET 2025)
description: A two-day international conference organised by PSR IT Department with paper presentations from researchers across 10 countries, in collaboration with Anna University.
